subcodes.first_line: There hath appeared before Us that which thou didst send from thy pen in remembrance of God unto Our name the Mahdi. Blessed art thou [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر بین یدینا ما ارسلته من اثر قلمک فی ذکر الله الی اسمنا المهدی فطوبی لک
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @chastisement and requital, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
